[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001100001 3
1 010001110 4
2 000100001 2
3 010000100 2
4 010100000 2
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 010000101 3

01 10 010100100 3
12 21 010000000 1
23 32 101010001 4
34 43 001000111 4
45 54 001000001 2
56 65 000000000 a match 5 6
67 76 010011000 3
70 07 110100001 4

02 20 110000001 3
13 31 000100110 3
24 42 011001001 4
35 53 001100001 3 match 0
46 64 010001110 4 match 1
57 75 000100001 2 match 2
60 06 010000100 2 match 3
71 17 010100000 2 match 4

14 41 010000110 3

36 63 000010110 3

50 05 000100001 2 match 2
61 16 010000110 3

15 51 000100000 1
